comparison_surface_note: Compares official Configuration serverbound resource_pack framed packet id and body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Serverbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Configuration serverbound resource_pack response framed dispatch/decode; not a runtime resource pack UI or accept/reject behavior test.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Configuration serverbound resource_pack response packet framing and dispatch/decode only; it does not prove runtime resource pack UI, accept/reject behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
